nasb.text: Now the end is upon you, and I will send My anger against you; I will judge you according to your ways and bring all your abominations upon you.

esv.text: Now the end is upon you, and I will send my anger upon you; I will judge you according to your ways, and I will punish you for all your abominations.

cnv.text: 現在終局已經臨到你了。 我要發怒攻擊你， 按著你的行為審判你，照著你一切可憎的事報應你。

ccb.text: 以色列，你的结局到了，我的怒气必倾倒在你身上，我必按你的行为审判你，照你的一切恶行报应你。
